topics.title: FDA finalizes safety reporting guidances for sponsors and investigators
topics.summary: The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has finalized two guidances for sponsors and investigators regarding adverse event reporting for drugs, biologics, and medical devices in clinical studies. Both guidances were issued on 16 December.

topics.title: FDA loosens restrictions on using patient-level RWD in medical device submissions
